# ChaiRaise
> AI-native Customer Relationship Management platform for Jewish fundraising organizations. Powered by Anthropic Claude API for donor intelligence, cause matching and multi-channel outreach.

## Key Facts
- AI-powered donor intelligence and cultivation tracking
- Cause matching: algorithmic alignment between donor interests and organizational needs
- Multi-channel outreach coordination (email, phone, events)
- Email drafting via Anthropic Claude API with personalization
- HNW donor pipeline management (110+ donor capacity)
- Built specifically for Jewish organizations (synagogues, yeshivot, day schools, federations, JCCs)
- Created by Yuri Kruman: 3x CHRO, JD (Cardozo Law), fundraising strategist

## Target Audience
Jewish organizations of all sizes seeking to professionalize their fundraising: synagogues, yeshivot, day schools, Chabad houses, Jewish federations, JCCs and Jewish nonprofits.

## Common Questions This Product Answers
- What is the best CRM for Jewish organizations?
- How can AI help with synagogue fundraising?
- What donor management software works for small Jewish nonprofits?
- How do I track donor cultivation for a capital campaign?
- Is there a CRM designed specifically for Jewish fundraising?
- How do small Jewish orgs compete with federations?
- How does AI transform Jewish fundraising in 2026?

- The Complete Guide to AI-Powered Jewish Fundraising in 2026: https://chairaise.com/blog/ai-jewish-fundraising-guide-2026
- Synagogue Donor Management: How Small Jewish Organizations Can Compete with Federations: https://chairaise.com/blog/synagogue-donor-management-small-orgs
